titleStmt.title: SII 10.550: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 550. (A.R. No. 230 of 1905.) ON THE EAST WALL OF THE DARK ROOM IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURĀNTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1264 (?) (Chitrabhānu)

summary.p: Incomplete. States that a certain Pōtāmbā put up a golden dhvaja in the temple of Tripurāntakēśvara. From the genealogy given which is not quite intelligible, it appears that Pōtāmbā was the wife of Sōma-Bhūpāla of the lunar race and Ātrēyagōtra and the daughter of Rāma-Bhūpāla, son of Goṅkaṇṇa, who was the son of Peda Rāma-Bhūpāla, who was the son of Goṅkaṇṇadēva of the Kāśyapa-gōtra, who had the title of Uttamagaṇḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīśakarājyābhiṣēkavatsaramulu jalanidhitarkkārkkasaṁkhyaṁ baragaṁpravimala[tara citra
bhānuvatsarambuna vinutakārttikamāsavimalapakṣa kalitapaṁcādaśiṁ gamaniyyatarasō-]
mavāsaraṁbuna budhavarṇanīyala samullāsaṁbu dīpiṁppa ratnajāṁbūnadaracita
maina vaijayaṁtti kumārādrivāsunakunu Aṁbbikānādhunakuṁ dripurāṁtakunaku bha
ktiṁ braṇutiṁcci yettiṁcceṁ baramapuṇyasōmabhūvarupōtāṁbasustiramuga . [1* .] svasti
śrītripurāṁttakadēva divyaśrīpādapadmārādhakuṁḍunu krakulakamala
mārttāṁḍuṁḍunu Oṟeyūripuravarādhīśvaruṁḍunu cāḷukyakulōdvahuṁḍu
nuttamagaṁḍabirudābhirāmuṁḍunu kāsyapagōtrapavitruṁḍunu naina . gōṁkaṇnadēva tanayuṁ ḍḍayina
pedarāmavasumatīpālaputruṁḍḍu manumagōṁkannunakuṁ brabhaviṁccina maldēvanṛpuṁ ḍayina rāmabhūpā
lunaku kūrmi putri yaina pōtama koḍuku svasti śrīsōmavaṁśaratnākara sudhākaruṁ
ḍunu vēṁgirāyabirudāṁkuṁḍunu prathananiśśaṁkuṁḍḍunu Avadhūtamaṁḍalīka gōrakṣu
ṁḍunu nikhilajanarakṣādakṣuṁḍunu nātrēyagōtruṁḍunu śubha caritru
ṁḍunu sōmabhūpāla juṁḍunu nainaṁ gōṁkarājunakuṁ buṇyaṁgā
svasti śrīśakavarṣaṁbulu 1264 Agu citrabhānukārttika śu
nāṁḍu śrītripurāṁttakadēvara kanakadhvajaṁbu (incomplete )
Digital edition of SII 10.550 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
